_comment: SCORED profile B1 — Group B ambiguity. Channel-dependent payment timing; direct channel → S5 surfaces. Serialized verbatim from docs/planning-artifacts/poc-respondent-specs-2026-06-02.md (v1.2-frozen) §Group B / B1.

facts.payment_timing_direct: 50% at booking, 50% two weeks before arrival
facts.payment_timing_ota: Collected by OTA at booking (not managed in Guesty)
facts.pain: Reconciling what Airbnb and VRBO pay me with what's actually in the system. It's a mess.

persona: Detailed and thorough; volunteers channel-level breakdowns without being asked. When agent asks about payment timing, respondent answers: 'Depends on the channel — Airbnb and VRBO collect at booking, but for direct bookings I take half upfront and the other half two weeks out.' Does not simplify unless agent pushes. Does not seek advice. Mentions direct bookings unprompted when discussing channels.

answer_key.payment_split: recorded:50/50 — second 50% due 14 days before arrival (direct channel only)

_note: S5 SURFACES (direct bookings confirmed) — represented as the conditional default; surfacing is intentional per spec. KEY EVAL CRITERION: agent must ask exactly ONE clarifying question for payment timing and record the channel-conditional structure, not a single enum. ownership_model normalized to canonical schema enum 'all_self_owned' (spec v1.3). Spec answer key is partial (hero/ambiguity slots only); facts carry full ground truth.
